column1:
Analyze compiler error messages to locate and fix syntax errors in code  
Differentiate between syntax errors, logic errors, and compiler warnings  
Apply best practices by focusing on fixing the first compiler error before addressing subsequent errors  
Understand that compiler error messages may be unclear or misleading and that errors may be reported on lines after the actual mistake  
Compile and run code frequently during development to detect and correct errors early
